title: tordylium elegans
intro: Tordylius elegans, also known as Wild Celery or Pepperwort, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tordylium elegans include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Tordylius elegans is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
